stories.title: Packet pe likha sab sach nahi hota
stories.description: CMYK Dots, FSSAI Number aur Green Symbol — tu roz dekhta hai par samajhta galat hai. Aaj asli meaning saamne aayega.
stories.tags: food symbols, hidden meaning, FSSAI, packaging truth, india viral

modules.video_generation_prompt: मैं सीएमवाईके डॉट्स — प्रिंटिंग कलर कोड होते पैकेज डिजाइन में, स्वाद या फ्लेवर से कोई संबंध नहीं, चार बेसिक इंक से बनता पूरा ग्राफिक, तू इन्हें टेस्ट समझता बेवकूफ गलत चीज खरीदता।
modules.image_generation_prompt: Pixar-style 3D render of a furious CMYK color dots character in its true printed circular dot form with cyan magenta yellow black colors, cartoon angry scrunched eyes, tiny nose, two small hands — one hand jabbing directly at camera, the other pointing at a food packet printing area — and two stubby legs planted wide on glossy packaging surface. Full body visible. Mouth wide open screaming. Leaning aggressively forward toward viewer. Scene is a real supermarket shelf with multiple food packets stacked, visible packaging designs and printing marks around. Bright indoor store lighting with reflections on plastic packets, dominant colors cyan, magenta, yellow and black. Camera eye-level confrontation angle making viewer feel caught. Mood is furious and betrayed, viewer feels exposed for misunderstanding something seen daily without questioning.

modules.video_generation_prompt: मैं एफएसएसएआई नंबर — चौदह अंकों का लाइसेंस हर फूड बिजनेस के लिए अनिवार्य, इससे कंपनी ट्रेस होती और सेफ्टी चेक होता, मैं रोज दिखता था तू नजरअंदाज करता साले नकली खाना खाता।
modules.image_generation_prompt: Pixar-style 3D render of a furious FSSAI license number character in its true printed numeric code form on food packet, cartoon angry scrunched eyes, tiny nose, two small hands — one hand jabbing directly at camera, the other pointing at the license number printed on packaging — and two stubby legs planted wide on packet surface. Full body visible. Mouth wide open screaming. Leaning aggressively forward toward viewer. Scene is a grocery store shelf with various branded packets, labels clearly visible, stacked tightly. Bright white fluorescent lighting, dominant colors white, green and multicolor packaging. Camera low-angle up-shot focusing on number area. Mood is furious and betrayed, viewer feels guilty for ignoring authenticity check every purchase.

modules.video_generation_prompt: मैं हरा वर्ग चिन्ह — केवल शाकाहारी इंग्रीडिएंट दिखाता, प्रोसेस या किचन सेपरेशन की गारंटी नहीं देता, नियम सिर्फ सामग्री पर लागू होता, तू आंख बंद भरोसा करता चुतिया धोखा खाता।
modules.image_generation_prompt: Pixar-style 3D render of a furious Veg Green Square symbol character in its true green square with dot form, extreme close-up view, cartoon angry scrunched eyes, tiny nose, two small hands — one jabbing directly at camera, other gesturing aggressively — and two stubby legs planted wide on packet surface. Full body visible. Mouth wide open screaming. Leaning aggressively forward toward viewer. Scene is a close-up of Indian packaged food with multiple symbols visible, shelf blurred in background. Bright store lighting reflecting on packet, dominant colors green, white and plastic gloss. Camera extreme close-up smash push-in creating intense meme frame. Mood is peak fury, viewer feels directly attacked for blind trust in label without understanding rule.

modules.video_generation_prompt: याद रख — डॉट्स सिर्फ प्रिंटिंग कोड, लाइसेंस नंबर सेफ्टी पहचान, हरा चिन्ह सिर्फ सामग्री। अगर हमसे कोई ज्ञान मिला तो ठोक दे लाइक बटन और फॉलो कर ले।
modules.image_generation_prompt: Pixar-style 3D render of three furious food packet symbols CMYK dots, FSSAI number and Veg Green Square together in their true forms on packaging surface, cartoon angry scrunched eyes, tiny noses, two small hands each — all jabbing toward camera — and stubby legs planted wide. Full bodies visible. Mouths open screaming in unison. Leaning aggressively forward. Scene is a supermarket aisle filled with food products on shelves, labels everywhere. Bright store lighting with reflections, dominant colors mixed vibrant packaging tones. Camera wide eye-level confrontation capturing all three. Mood is overwhelming confrontation, viewer feels surrounded and guilty for ignoring truth hidden in plain sight daily.
